title: Performance
description: The system must respond to user input within a reasonable time frame and perform tasks efficiently.

title: Reliability
description: The system must be able to recover from failures and maintain data integrity.

title: Security
description: The system must protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.

title: Privacy
description: The system must ensure that user data is handled in accordance with relevant laws and regulations.

title: Scalability
description: The system must be able to handle an increasing number of users and data without compromising performance.

title: Usability
description: The system must be easy to use and navigate, with clear and intuitive interfaces.

title: Maintainability
description: The system must be easy to modify and update, with clear and well-structured code.

title: Compatibility
description: The system must be compatible with different browsers and devices.

title: Integration
description: The system must be able to integrate with other systems and tools.
